scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.start:client: cd client && npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.setup: cp server/.env.example server/.env && echo '✅ Copied .env.example — now add your DB credentials to server/.env'
